summary: Extract execution domains and make built-in adapters emit the native JSON protocol
description: Extract execution domains and make built-in adapters emit the native JSON protocol
acceptance: Routing, task state, and adapter execution have focused importable owners behind the compatible CLI facade
Codex and Hermes built-in adapters produce validated agent-adapter-result.v1 output without legacy wrapping

evidence.summary: 60 pytest tests and make check passed; routing, task-state, and native-adapter owners are importable; Codex/Hermes build, critic, and repair require validated agent-adapter-result.v1 output; malformed or missing native protocol fails closed while custom legacy adapters remain compatible.
